bullets: 1800W Maximum Power: Aeitto blender with the 1800W peak power delivers high performance. It effortlessly handles professional tasks—from smoothies and soups to nut butters—in seconds, minimizing wait time while preserving ingredients' nutrients. The blenders for kitchen is sturdy and durable, easily conquering the daily challenges of intense cooking.

68Oz. BPA -free Jar: Enjoy our 68oz. large capacity jar made of food-safe materials that are 100% BPA-free. Prepare up to 6 cups per batch—ideal for family meals or entertaining guests. The blender for smoothies of large capacity is designed for personal use as well - whether it's for a quick breakfast or refreshing beverages.

Smart 3+7 Programs Control:The smoothie blender simplifies operation, preset smoothies, juices, crushed ice, one button directly. Seven adjustable speeds allow seamless task switching and precise texture control, empowering you to create diverse flavors. These versatile functions support endless culinary experiments, making meal preparation effortless.

Auto-Clean & Dishwasher Safe: Cleaning has never been easier! Activate the one-touch self-cleaning mode—just add water and detergent for a thorough rinse in 30 seconds. All detachable parts except the motor base are dishwasher-safe, saving you time. Enjoy worry-free hygiene and consistent cleanliness with every use.

LED Display Panel: The countertop blender clear interface provides real-time monitoring of speed, time, and program status for intuitive operation. Its user-friendly design ensures precise control at every step, guaranteeing optimal blending results.
